meta.scope: Ranked and compared views cover 50 states plus DC (51 jurisdictions). Territories are shown where data exists and are excluded from ranking.
meta.interpretation: This dashboard is descriptive and correlational. It shows variation in administrative performance across jurisdictions. It does not claim that administration causes mobility outcomes.

composite_index.note: A blended 0-100 composite index is planned for a later stage. v1 shows raw metrics only; no score is computed.

build.note: Interim build. Live dimensions are validated and labeled with source and vintage. Pending dimensions are shown as pending a source, not as numbers, until their live feed is ingested.

ui_first_pay_14_21.label: UI first payments within 14/21 days
ui_first_pay_14_21.definition: Percent of intrastate unemployment insurance first payments made within 14/21 days of the first compensable week.
ui_first_pay_14_21.source_label: ETA 9050 First Payment Time Lapse, 2026-05, DOL Employment and Training Administration

snap_apt_timely.label: SNAP applications processed timely
snap_apt_timely.definition: Percent of SNAP applications processed timely, within 30 days for regular applications and 7 days for expedited, from the SNAP Quality Control active-case sample.
snap_apt_timely.source_label: SNAP Application Processing Timeliness (APT), FY2024, USDA Food and Nutrition Service

wioa_adult_emp_q2.label: WIOA Adult employment rate, Q2 after exit
wioa_adult_emp_q2.definition: WIOA Title I Adult employment rate in the second quarter after program exit.
wioa_adult_emp_q2.source_label: WIOA State Performance (ETA-9169), PY2023, DOL Employment and Training Administration

wioa_adult_median_earnings_q2.label: WIOA Adult median earnings, Q2 after exit
wioa_adult_median_earnings_q2.definition: WIOA Title I Adult median earnings in the second quarter after program exit, in dollars.
wioa_adult_median_earnings_q2.source_label: WIOA State Performance (ETA-9169), PY2023, DOL Employment and Training Administration

wioa_adult_credential.label: WIOA Adult credential attainment rate
wioa_adult_credential.definition: WIOA Title I Adult credential attainment rate.
wioa_adult_credential.source_label: WIOA State Performance (ETA-9169), PY2023, DOL Employment and Training Administration

ui_first_pay_14_21.source: ETA 9050 First Payment Time Lapse, 2026-05, DOL Employment and Training Administration

snap_apt_timely.source: SNAP Application Processing Timeliness (APT), FY2024, USDA Food and Nutrition Service
